ksa_text: Determine risks of operating or using systems and establish monitoring strategies to identify and track operational security threats.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of enterprise cybersecurity architecture principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.
Knowledge of enterprise cybersecurity architecture principles and practices

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-T-010 (SP, Task) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.5066 is insufficient to establish relevance to self-service analytics, business-led data exploration, and low-code BI at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.507, nist_ai_rmf=0.475, dcwf=0.433) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.5066 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does SP-domain KSA SP-T-010 (composite 0.5066) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: SP domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST CSF, ISO 27001; security competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data access controls awareness, not security architecture. Composite 0.5066 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms SP domain KSA at composite 0.5066 is not a standard requirement for Citizen Data Scientist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.5066, domain SP, scope weak fit. High confidence.
